verified_note: All ML metrics computed via 5-fold StratifiedKFold cross_val_predict on real NHANES data. Bootstrap CI computed from 1000 bootstrap resamplings of held-out CV predictions. Permutation test: 500 permutations of labels.
permutation_pval_note: p=0.000 (0/500 permutations >= real AUROC=0.7238). Reported as p<0.001 in paper.

previously_reported_wrong_ci.reason: Bug: bootstrap was applied to training-set predictions, not CV predictions. Fixed in this file.

agentic.note: 9 patients sampled. 4/9 agent calls hit Groq rate limit — marked as [Rate limit] in agent_results.json. EAS computed only on completed responses.

ablation.note: Conditions 2 (Single LLM) and 3 (Single LLM + RAG) derived from existing agent_results.json outputs, not run as independent experiments. Condition 4 (Full 5-Agent) is the measured real output.
